name: Missing Check for Certificate Revocation after Initial Check
description: The product checks certificate revocation status once but fails to re-verify before each subsequent privileged action, creating a race condition where a revoked certificate can be used maliciously between the initial check and later operations.
detection_pattern: AUTH node performs initial certificate revocation check but subsequent CONTROL nodes executing privileged operations do not re-verify revocation status via EXTERNAL CRL/OCSP check
